title: gilia floccosa
intro: Gilia floccosa, also known as Downy Gilia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gilia floccosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Gilia floccosa is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
